## Description

A clear and concise description of the feature or enhancement you'd like to see.

## Motivation

Why is this feature needed? What problem does it solve?

## Proposed Solution

Describe how you envision this feature working. Include examples if helpful.

```
// Example usage
```

## Alternatives Considered

Have you considered other approaches? What are the trade-offs?

## Additional Context

Add any other context, mockups, or references here (links to similar features in other tools, research papers, etc.).

## Related Issues

Does this relate to any existing issues? (e.g., #123)
